title: CMD.BSP.004.ENV.ALLOCATE_PERIOD_BUDGET — Allocate the categorised period budget for a beneficiary
description: Payload of the ALLOCATE_PERIOD_BUDGET command. Issued by POL.BSP.004.ENV.ON_BENEFICIARY_ENROLLED on RVT.BSP.002.CASE_OPENED, handled by AGG.BSP.004.ENV.PERIOD_BUDGET. Emits one RVT.BSP.004.ENVELOPE_INITIALIZED per category in tier_snapshot. Idempotent on trigger.event_id over the lifetime of the period.

category.description: Spending category covered by this envelope (e.g. ESSENTIAL_GROCERY, TRANSPORT).

cap_amount.description: Maximum amount authorised for this envelope over the period (currency-neutral; programme currency assumed).

event_id.description: IDEMPOTENCY KEY. Identifier of the upstream resource event that caused this command.

occurred_at.description: Timestamp of the upstream fact (ISO-8601, UTC). Used for ordering, NOT for idempotency.

case_id.description: CORRELATION KEY. Reference to the participation case (Reliever case ID, owned by CAP.BSP.002.ENR).

period_index.description: Zero-based index of the period in the beneficiary's participation sequence. period_index = 0 at enrolment.

period_end.description: Inclusive end of the period (when the period closes and unconsumed signals are emitted).

tier_snapshot.description: Snapshot of the active tier definition that drives the per-category caps. Sourced from CAP.REF.001.TIE.

tier_id.description: Identifier of the tier (e.g. T1_INITIAL, T2_PROGRESSING).

categories.description: Non-empty list of (category, cap_amount) pairs; one envelope is created per entry.
